Module 6:
Open Cart Considerations
!
Executive Summary
We’re now going to talk about the actual sequence of your open cart. First
of all, you should leave your cart open for 3 to 7 days.
For most people 5 to 7 is golden. More than 7 days is a beg-a-thon.
You can do shorter but this is an advanced technique. In general, it’ll you
and your partners less time to adjust as things happen during the launch.
My favorite opening days are Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday. Friday also
works. This does depend on the market though - they all react differently.
For closing days, just avoid the weekends. Make sure to close at midnight
and not during the middle of the day.
!
Days of the week I’ve used:
• 	Open Monday, close Friday (5 days)
• 	Open Tuesday, close Thursday (3 days)
• 	Open Wednesday, close Friday (3 days)
• 	Open Tuesday, close Monday (7 days)
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	Open Thursday, close Monday (5 days)
• 	Open Thursday, close Wednesday (7 days)
• 	Don’t overanalyze this - it’s not rocket science and it’s flexible
!
When to Send Emails
• 	Cart open day: two emails
• 	First email: “We’re open” - very short email, make sure to keep this
brief
• 	Second email: “Tsunami email” - something quirky happens usually
during launch so use this as an opportunity to email people again
• 	Send an email EVERY DAY during your launch
• 	Answering objections
• 	What’s happening with people who’ve bought
• 	Feedback you’ve gotten
• 	The day before you close cart you must create scarcity - many ways to
do this
• 	In order of power:
• 	Close cart
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	Price goes up
• 	Bonuses go away
• 	Cart closing day: Send two or three e-mails
• 	6 AM: we're closing tonight
• 	12 PM: We're closing in 12 hours
• 	6 PM: Last chance - “thank you”
• 	This is important - you need to close down with power or else you
will leave a lot of sales on the table
!
